metadata.description: Deploys an Azure Container Instance running a custom PowerShell script that sends synthetic Spam/Phish/Malware emails via SMTP relay to EOP.
Your tenant name (e.g. 'contoso' or 'fourthcoffee'). The SMTP endpoint is automatically derived as <tenantName>-com.mail.protection.outlook.com.
Deploy a NAT Gateway for reliable outbound SMTP on port 25. Recommended — many Azure subscriptions block outbound port 25 without a NAT Gateway.
SMTP port. Default 25 for direct-to-MX delivery. EOP MX endpoints listen on port 25.
Comma-separated list of recipient email addresses.
Number of emails each recipient should receive. The script sends in rounds of 5 random recipients until all have reached this count.
Percentage of emails that include a threat payload: GTUBE (spam), phishing URL, or EICAR (malware) attachment (0-100).
